name: ExtensionAdministrableProductDefinition_UnitOfPresentation
title: R5: The presentation type in which this item is given to a patient. e.g. for a spray - 'puff' (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `AdministrableProductDefinition.unitOfPresentation` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`AdministrableProductDefinition.unitOfPresentation` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `AdministrableProductDefinition.unitOfPresentation` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `AdministrableProductDefinition.unitOfPresentation` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `AdministrableProductDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `AdministrableProductDefinition.unitOfPresentation` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The presentation type in which this item is given to a patient. e.g. for a spray - 'puff' (new)
element.comment:
Element `AdministrableProductDefinition.unitOfPresentation` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `AdministrableProductDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `AdministrableProductDefinition.unitOfPresentation` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: The presentation type in which this item is given to a patient. e.g. for a spray - 'puff'
element.definition: The presentation type in which this item is given to a patient. e.g. for a spray - 'puff' (as in 'contains 100 mcg per puff'), or for a liquid - 'vial' (as in 'contains 5 ml per vial').

binding.description: The presentation type in which an administrable medicinal product is given to a patient.
